mapper.select: select qbq.*, qb.title as bankTitle, q.title as questionTitle from question_bank_question qbq left join question_bank qb on qbq.question_bank_id = qb.id left join interview_question q on qbq.question_id = q.id where qbq.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into question_bank_question (question_bank_id, question_id, sort_order) values (#{questionBankId}, #{questionId}, #{sortOrder})
